Container.Name: MeshCore-Self-Hosted
Container.Overview: Self-hosted MeshCore web application with automatic updates. Hosts the official MeshCore web client locally, allowing you to connect to your MeshCore companion radio via Bluetooth or USB. Automatically checks for and downloads new versions hourly.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the MeshCore web interface

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for container logs e.g. America/Chicago, America/New_York, Europe/London

Config.Name: Update Interval
Config.Description: How often to check for MeshCore updates in seconds. Default is 3600 (1 hour).

Config.Name: Pin Version
Config.Description: Pin to a specific MeshCore version e.g. v1.43.0. Leave blank to always use the latest version. When set, auto-updates are disabled.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL for MeshCore releases. Do not change unless you know what you are doing.
